title: Change dates for quarters (Q1-Q4) on Gantt charts
excerpt: I would like to request the feature to change the dates of the quarters that automatically display on a Gantt chart. Right now there is no way to edit the dates of the Q1-Q4 that show up on the chart. Our company is a NG…

posts.author: mmcdonald (Megan McDonald)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to request the feature to change the dates of the quarters that automatically display on a Gantt chart. Right now there is no way to edit the dates of the Q1-Q4 that show up on the chart. Our company is a NGO and follows the same fiscal year as the government so it’s non-traditional fiscal quarters.
